summary: Completed testing of Country Selector feature in Registration form. All tests passed - country selector shows Mexico by default, dropdown opens with search bar and country list with flags, selecting Colombia changes phone code to +57, phone input filters non-digits and limits to 10 chars, full registration flow works and stores country in DB.

issues: Minor: After registration with Colombia country, verify-phone page shows 'País no encontrado' (Country not found) - this appears to be a display issue on the verify-phone page, not affecting registration

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - API healthy - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with country=MX - Registration successful - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with country=CO - Registration successful - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with country=US - Registration successful - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/register without country field - Registration successful (optional field) - PASSED
Backend: Phone format with country code accepted - PASSED
Frontend: Registration page loads with data-testid='register-page' - PASSED
Frontend: Country selector shows Mexico (🇲🇽 México) by default - PASSED
Frontend: Country selector has data-testid='country-select' - PASSED
Frontend: Phone input shows +52 prefix for Mexico - PASSED
Frontend: Country dropdown opens with search bar (data-testid='country-search-input') - PASSED
Frontend: Country options have data-testid='country-option-{CODE}' (e.g. country-option-CO) - PASSED
Frontend: Search for 'Colombia' filters country list correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting Colombia changes phone prefix to +57 - PASSED
Frontend: Phone input filters non-digit characters - PASSED
Frontend: Phone input limits to 10 digits max - PASSED
Frontend: Full registration flow with Colombia country - PASSED
Frontend: Registration redirects to /verify-phone on success - PASSED
Frontend: Success toast '¡Cuenta creada exitosamente!' displayed - PASSED
Database: Country field stored correctly in user document (CO for Colombia) - PASSED
Database: Phone stored with country code prefix (+573124567890) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Country selector implementation is complete and working correctly
Phone input correctly filters non-digits and limits to 10 characters
Country code prefix updates automatically when country changes
Backend UserCreate model accepts optional 'country' field
Country is stored in user document in MongoDB
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test users with various country codes (MX, CO, US) during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Country Selector feature in registration is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Country selector has data-testid='country-select', (2) Default country is Mexico (MX), (3) Dropdown has search input with data-testid='country-search-input', (4) Country options have data-testid='country-option-{CODE}', (5) Phone prefix updates automatically when country changes, (6) Phone input filters non-digits and limits to 10 chars, (7) Country field is stored in user document in MongoDB.
